hop-8-to-9.notes: Permission V5 API is mostly backwards compatible for common usage patterns

hop-9-to-10.notes: No breaking PHP API changes via Rector between these minor versions

hop-10-to-11.notes: Permission V6 supports Laravel 10-11+. Structural changes are config/migration level — require manual review.

hop-12-to-13.notes: Permission V7 requires PHP ^8.4 and supports Laravel 12-13 only. Requires migration from V6.
